word: G4836 - συμπαραγίνομαι - symparagínomai - soom-par-ag-in'-om-ahee - Come together

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συμπαραγίνομαι

- Transliteration: Sumparaginomai

- Phonetic: soom-par-ag-in'-om-ahee

- Definition:

1. to come together

2. to come to one's help

- Origin: from G4862 and G3854

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G3854; to be present together that is to convene; by implication to appear in aid: - come together stand with.
